title: Value Proposition Canvas Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Value Proposition Canvas skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

defined_target_customer.description: Defined target customer segment with demographic and behavioral characteristics

customer_research_data.description: Customer research data: interview transcripts, observation notes, or survey results capturing jobs, pains, and gains

inventory_existing_proposed.description: Inventory of existing or proposed product features, services, and capabilities

prioritization_input_on.description: Prioritization input on which customer jobs are most important to the segment

competitive_product_feature.description: Competitive product feature maps to identify where competitors address the same customer profile

net_promoter_score.description: Net Promoter Score verbatims or support ticket logs to surface unarticulated pains
